name: Signal Control Simulator
short_description: The job of a "signal worker" is to protect the safety of Japan's railways behind the scenes. Operate the interlocking panels to safely and accurately operate trains that run in seconds. You can experience the work of a signal attendant, which is essential for safe railway operation.
detailed_description:
You can experience the work of a "signal worker" who protects the safety of Japan's railways behind the scenes.
Operate the interlocking board to run the train according to the schedule determined in seconds.

Features

  • Realistic interlocking board using 3DCG
  • Operation of interlocking panels similar to the real thing, such as locks

Stations where you can experience

  • Hinatagaoka 2 sides 4 lines
  • Harukaze Park 2nd floor 6th line
  • Toyotama/Mukoyama 2nd floor, 6th line (Toyotama), 1th floor, 2nd line (Mukaiyama)
